examples: He sat with such regal dignity.
She dismissed him with a regal gesture.
O good sir, peradventure you mean the ragged regal vagrant that tarried here the night.
In a given year, as much as 70% of Regal-Beloits capital budget may go toward used equipment.
Theres plenty of oil to smell at Regal-Beloit, a transmission and electric-motor company tucked away in Beloit, Wis.
